content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Clean implementation. The debug-vs-release hypothesis was correctly tested through comprehensive benchmarking and disproven (single test: 69.65s debug vs 65.63s release; full suite and conformance actually slower in release). No source code changes were made — the correct decision since the data doesn't support adding [profile.test] opt-level. Bead metadata was updated with corrected benchmark commands and recorded results, and a well-scoped follow-up profiling bead (ralph-burning-lmm) was created with a blocking dependency. All JSONL is valid, nix build passes, and the approach is sound.

## Amendments

None.
